bugs.description: Email validation accepts 'user@' as valid — regex pattern [^@]+@[^@] is missing domain requirement
Clearing the quantity field shows 'Total: $NaN' — parseInt on empty string returns NaN with no fallback
Credit card input has no maxlength attribute — entering >20 characters causes text to overflow the container
Zip code field has no 'required' attribute — form can be submitted without a zip code
Form submit triggers 'Uncaught ReferenceError: stripe is not defined' — payment SDK not loaded
